scanner_go_nested_depthState.description: State model derived from scanner_go_nested_depth TLA+ spec

ReceiverResolution.message:
ReceiverResolution violation: \A s \in skeletons :
        \/ (s.class_name = "None" /\ s.has_recv = FALSE)
        \/ (s.class_name # "None" /\ s....
ReceiverResolution.description: Verifier for invariant ReceiverResolution from scanner_go_nested_depth spec

VisibilityCorrect.message:
VisibilityCorrect violation: \A s \in skeletons :
        \/ (s.visibility = "public"  /\ s.cap = TRUE)
        \/ (s.visibility = "private" /\ s....
VisibilityCorrect.description: Verifier for invariant VisibilityCorrect from scanner_go_nested_depth spec

conditions:
cursor > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            \E s \in skeletons : s.func_name = Events[k].name
AllRecorded.message:
AllRecorded violation: cursor > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            \E s \in skeletons : s.func_name = Events[k].name
AllRecorded.description: Verifier for invariant AllRecorded from scanner_go_nested_depth spec

assert_ReceiverResolution.condition:
\A s in skeletons :
        or (s.class_name = "None" and s.has_recv = FALSE)
        or (s.class_name # "None" and s.has_recv = TRUE)
assert_ReceiverResolution.message:
Assertion failed: ReceiverResolution — \A s \in skeletons :
        \/ (s.class_name = "None" /\ s.has_recv = FALSE)
        \/ (s.class_name # "None" /\ s....
assert_ReceiverResolution.description: Test assertion for ReceiverResolution from scanner_go_nested_depth spec

assert_VisibilityCorrect.condition:
\A s in skeletons :
        or (s.visibility = "public"  and s.cap = TRUE)
        or (s.visibility = "private" and s.cap = FALSE)
assert_VisibilityCorrect.message:
Assertion failed: VisibilityCorrect — \A s \in skeletons :
        \/ (s.visibility = "public"  /\ s.cap = TRUE)
        \/ (s.visibility = "private" /\ s....
assert_VisibilityCorrect.description: Test assertion for VisibilityCorrect from scanner_go_nested_depth spec

assert_AllRecorded.condition:
cursor > N implies
        \A k in 1..N :
            \E s in skeletons : s.func_name = Events[k].name
assert_AllRecorded.message:
Assertion failed: AllRecorded — cursor > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            \E s \in skeletons : s.func_name = Events[k].name
assert_AllRecorded.description: Test assertion for AllRecorded from scanner_go_nested_depth spec
